html,body{background:#0d0703;font-family:'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif;overflow:hidden;width:100%;height:100%;margin:0;padding:0;touch-action:none} body{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center} .screen{display:none;width:100%;height:100%;min-height:100vh;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden} .screen.active{display:flex} /* TITLE */ #titleScreen{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#0d1b2a 0%,#1a3a1a 40%,#3d2010 100%);position:relative;overflow:hidden} .title-logo{font-family:'Trebuchet MS','Comic Sans MS',cursive;font-size:clamp(2.2rem,7vw,4rem);color:var(--gold);text-shadow:3px 3px 0 #8B4513,6px 6px 0 #5c2a0a,0 0 30px rgba(255,200,0,0.5);text-align:center;line-height:1.1;z-index:2;padding:0 20px} .title-sub{font-family:'Trebuchet MS','Comic Sans MS',cursive;font-size:clamp(1rem,3vw,1.4rem);color:#a8d8a8;text-shadow:1px 1px 0 #2a5a2a;letter-spacing:2px;text-align:center;margin-top:6px;z-index:2} .pickaxe-icon{font-size:clamp(2.5rem,8vw,5rem);margin-bottom:10px;z-index:2;animation:swing 2s ease-in-out infinite;transform-origin:bottom right} @keyframes swing{0%,100%{transform:rotate(-15deg)}50%{transform:rotate(15deg)}} .gem-row{display:flex;gap:10px;margin:14px 0;z-index:2} .gem-preview{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);overflow:hidden;position:relative;animation:glow-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite} .gem-preview img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover} @keyframes glow-pulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 8px 2px rgba(255,220,50,0.3)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 18px 6px rgba(255,220,50,0.7)}} .btn{font-family:'Trebuchet MS','Comic Sans MS',cursive;font-size:clamp(1.1rem,4vw,1.5rem);padding:14px 40px;border-radius:50px;border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;z-index:2} .btn:active{transform:scale(0.95)} .btn-primary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FFD700,#FF8C00);color:#1a0800;box-shadow:0 6px 0 #8B4513,0 8px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)} .btn-primary:active{box-shadow:0 2px 0 #8B4513,0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);transform:translateY(4px) scale(0.98)} .btn-secondary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4a7c4e,#2d5a30);color:#e8f5e9;box-shadow:0 4px 0 #1a3a1d;margin-top:10px;font-size:clamp(0.9rem,3vw,1.1rem);padding:10px 28px} /* LEVEL SELECT */ #levelScreen{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#0d1b2a 0%,#1a3a1a 50%,#3d2010 100%);overflow-y:auto;padding:20px} .level-title{font-family:'Trebuchet MS','Comic Sans MS',cursive;font-size:clamp(1.5rem,5vw,2.2rem);color:var(--gold);text-align:center;margin-bottom:20px;text-shadow:2px 2px 0 #5c2a0a} .level-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:14px;width:100%;max-width:500px} .level-card{background:var(--ui-bg);border-radius:16px;padding:16px 12px;border:2px solid rgba(255,200,50,0.2);cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;text-align:center} .level-card:hover,.level-card:active{border-color:var(--gold);transform:scale(1.03);box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(255,200,50,0.3)} .level-card.locked{opacity:0.5;cursor:not-allowed} .level-icon{font-size:2.2rem;margin-bottom:6px} .level-name{font-family:'Trebuchet MS','Comic Sans MS',cursive;font-size:clamp(0.85rem,2.5vw,1.1rem);color:var(--gold)} .level-loc{font-size:0.75rem;color:#aaa;margin-top:3px} .level-stars{color:var(--gold);font-size:1rem;margin-top:5px} .back-btn{font-family:'Trebuchet MS','Comic Sans MS',cursive;background:none;border:2px solid rgba(255,200,50,0.4);color:var(--gold);padding:8px 22px;border-radius:30px;cursor:pointer;margin-top:16px;font-size:1rem} /* GAME */ #gameScreen{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100vw;height:100vh;background:#000;overflow:hidden} #gameCanvas{display:block;width:100%;height:100%;touch-action:none;position:absolute;top:0;left:0} #hud{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:8px 12px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(0,0,0,0.85) 0%,transparent 100%);pointer-events:none;z-index:10} #hud-score{font-family:'Trebuchet MS','Comic Sans MS',cursive;font-size:clamp(1rem,3.5vw,1.4rem);color:var(--gold);text-shadow:1px 1px 0 #000} #hud-level{font-family:'Trebuchet MS','Comic Sans MS',cursive;font-size:clamp(0.8rem,2.5vw,1rem);color:#a8d8a8} #hud-gems{display:flex;gap:4px;align-items:center} .hud-gem{width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);overflow:hidden} .hud-gem img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover} #controls{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;padding:10px 14px 16px;pointer-events:none;z-index:10} .ctrl-group{display:flex;gap:8px;pointer-events:all} .ctrl-btn{width:clamp(54px,14vw,70px);height:clamp(54px,14vw,70px);border-radius:50%;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);color:#fff;font-size:clamp(1.3rem,4vw,1.8rem);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;backdrop-filter:blur(4px);transition:background 0.1s,transform 0.1s} .ctrl-btn:active,.ctrl-btn.pressed{background:rgba(255,200,50,0.35);transform:scale(0.93)} #btnSwing{background:rgba(180,40,0,0.55);border-color:rgba(255,150,50,0.7)} #btnSwing:active,#btnSwing.pressed{background:rgba(255,90,0,0.75)} /* MINERAL POPUP */ #mineralPopup{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:50;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.8);backdrop-filter:blur(4px)} #mineralPopup.show{display:flex} .popup-card{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a0e05 0%,#2d1a08 100%);border-radius:22px;padding:28px 32px;border:2px solid var(--gold);box-shadow:0 0 50px rgba(255,200,50,0.4);max-width:min(96vw,520px);text-align:center;animation:pop-in 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)} @keyframes pop-in{from{transform:scale(0.4) rotate(-8deg);opacity:0}to{transform:scale(1) rotate(0);opacity:1}} .popup-mineral-img{width:220px;height:220px;border-radius:18px;margin:0 auto 18px;object-fit:cover;box-shadow:0 0 35px rgba(255,200,50,0.5),0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);border:2px solid rgba(255,220,100,0.3)} .popup-name{font-family:'Trebuchet MS','Comic Sans MS',cursive;font-size:clamp(1.3rem,4vw,1.8rem);color:var(--gold)} .popup-formula{font-size:1rem;color:#aaa;font-style:italic;margin-top:2px} .popup-points{font-family:'Trebuchet MS','Comic Sans MS',cursive;font-size:1.9rem;color:#4ade80;margin:8px 0} .popup-fact{font-size:0.95rem;color:#d4c5a9;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:14px} .popup-rarity{display:inline-block;padding:6px 18px;border-radius:20px;font-size:0.95rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px} .rarity-common{background:#3a4a2a;color:#b8d8a8} .rarity-uncommon{background:#1a3a5a;color:#90c8f8} .rarity-rare{background:#3a1a5a;color:#d0a0f8} .rarity-legendary{background:#5a3a02;color:#ffd060;box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,200,50,0.5)} /* GAME OVER */ #gameOverScreen{background:rgba(0,0,0,0.92);position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:60;display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px} #gameOverScreen.show{display:flex} .over-title{font-family:'Trebuchet MS','Comic Sans MS',cursive;font-size:clamp(2rem,7vw,3rem);color:var(--gold);text-align:center} .over-score{font-family:'Trebuchet MS','Comic Sans MS',cursive;font-size:clamp(1.2rem,4vw,1.8rem);color:#4ade80;margin:12px 0} .over-gems-found{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;justify-content:center;max-width:340px;margin:10px 0 20px} .over-gem-badge{background:rgba(255,200,50,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,200,50,0.3);border-radius:10px;padding:5px 10px;font-size:0.8rem;color:#f0e0b0;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px} .over-gem-badge img{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:4px;object-fit:cover} /* SHOP */ #shopScreen{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#0a0a1a 0%,#1a0e05 100%);overflow-y:auto;padding:20px} .shop-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;width:100%;max-width:500px} .shop-item{background:var(--ui-bg);border-radius:14px;padding:14px;border:2px solid rgba(255,200,50,0.15);text-align:center;transition:border-color 0.2s} .shop-item.owned{border-color:rgba(74,222,128,0.4)} .shop-item-icon{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:6px} .shop-item-name{font-family:'Trebuchet MS','Comic Sans MS',cursive;font-size:1rem;color:#f0e0b0} .shop-item-desc{font-size:0.72rem;color:#888;margin:4px 0 8px;line-height:1.4} .shop-item-price{font-family:'Trebuchet MS','Comic Sans MS',cursive;color:var(--gold);font-size:1.1rem} .shop-buy-btn{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FFD700,#FF8C00);color:#1a0800;border:none;border-radius:20px;padding:7px 18px;font-family:'Trebuchet MS','Comic Sans MS',cursive;font-size:0.9rem;cursor:pointer;margin-top:6px;transition:opacity 0.2s} .shop-buy-btn:disabled{background:#444;color:#777;cursor:not-allowed}
